title: onsemi Commemorates Transfer of Ownership of East Fishkill, New York Facility from GlobalFoundries with Ribbon Cutting Ceremony
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--onsemi (Nasdaq: ON) a leader in intelligent power and sensing technologies, today announced the successful completion of its acquisition of GlobalFoundries' (GF's) 300 mm East Fishkill (EFK), New York site and fabrication facility, effective December 31, 2022.
